creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Thanks for working on this and providing a patch.  That said, from  
experience we know that having such patches locally is usually not 
working out well, and I'd like to suggest to push this upstream. 

http://gcc.gnu.org/contribute.html has a summary of how to do so, and 
I will be happy to support you in this endeavour.  It's best by first 
reporting a bug upstream (http://gcc.gnu.org/bugzilla) and then submit 
the patch to java-patches@gcc.gnu.org.  Feel free to Cc: me with my 
gerald@pfeifer.com address on that submission.  Thanks! 

Once this, or a variation, is upstream we will obtain it within less 
than seven days on average.
